name: cmo
description: Chief Marketing Officer toolkit — bundles the 1150-line CMO strategic persona agent and 15 marketing skills consolidated into one plugin. Strategic (7): cmo-strategic-vision-canvas, cmo-cross-functional-translation-matrix, cmo-ceo-cfo-alignment-audit, customer-segmentation-canvas, positioning-statement-builder, marketing-plan-generator, marketing-kpi-scorecard-builder. Tactical (8, formerly marketing-toolkit): ab-test-designer, ai-marketing-prompts, email-campaign-builder, email-metrics-analyzer, marketing-performance-dashboard, seo-onpage-checklist, social-listening-keywords-builder, social-media-content-calendar. Hard financial boundary (marketing efficiency only, P&L needs CFO). Project memory delegated to /second-brain:project-memory-recall with role=cmo.
